product_overview: Silius is a mobile-first social community and event discovery platform (vibes) that lets users create, find, join and check-in to local events while building unidirectional friend networks and receiving notifications.
core_goals: Enable secure email/Google authentication and enforce profile completion before platform access
Support creation, discovery, participation and real-time check-in of events (vibes) with daily creation limits
Provide social features: unidirectional friends, comments (nested), notifications and user profiles with scoring and leaderboards
Offer a lightweight CMS for dynamic public pages and a safe admin surface (service role usage limited/mitigated)
Keep interactions performant (short cache TTLs, timeouts) and protect data with Row Level Security and service-key safety measures

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User signup, login (email/password and Google OAuth) and retrieval of the authenticated user's session/profile.
user_flows: POST /auth/v1/signup with {email, password, kvkkConsent:true} -> Receive 200 with session token and user metadata -> GET /auth/v1/user with token -> Receive 200 with authenticated user details
POST /auth/v1/token with {email, password} -> Receive 200 with JWT session -> GET /auth/v1/user with JWT -> Receive 200 with user object including auth.uid
POST /auth/v1/signup with missing kvkkConsent:false -> Receive 400 with validation error (KVKK consent required)
POST /auth/v1/token with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: User Profile
features.description: Fetch and update user profile rows in the users table; used for profile completion and profile edits.
user_flows: GET /rest/v1/users?select=* with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with current user's profile row
PATCH /rest/v1/users (body: {id:<userId>, firstName,lastName,username,age,gender,bio,isProfileComplete:true}) with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with updated profile row
GET /rest/v1/users?select=* without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
PATCH /rest/v1/users with invalid fields (e.g. username too short) with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation errors

features.name: Event Management (Vibes)
features.description: Create, list, update and delete events. Enforces per-user daily creation limit and supports filtering/sorting.
user_flows: POST /rest/v1/events with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {title,description,date,location,category,image} -> Receive 201 with created event id
GET /rest/v1/events?order=created_at.desc&category=eq.club&search=ilike.*term* with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with filtered/sorted event list
POST /rest/v1/events with Authorization: Bearer <token> when user has created 3 events today -> Receive 429 Too Many Requests with message indicating retry after / remaining reset time
PATCH /rest/v1/events?id=eq.<eventId> with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {title,description} (user is not owner) -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Event Participation & QR Check-in
features.description: Join/leave events and perform QR-driven check-ins which mark the participant checked_in and record checkin entries.
user_flows: POST /rest/v1/event_participants with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {event_id:<id>, user_id:<userId>} -> Receive 201 with participant record
DELETE /rest/v1/event_participants?id=eq.<participantId> with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 204 No Content (left event)
POST /rest/v1/event_checkins with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {event_id:<id>, user_id:<userId>} -> Receive 201 with checkin record and vibe_points_earned
POST /rest/v1/event_checkins without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /rest/v1/event_participants with Authorization: Bearer <token> when already participant -> Receive 409 Conflict (duplicate participant)

features.name: Comments
features.description: Add comments and threaded replies to events and fetch comments with nested replies.
user_flows: POST /rest/v1/comments with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {event_id:<id>, user_id:<userId>, text:'Nice vibe!'} -> Receive 201 with created comment id
POST /rest/v1/comments with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {event_id:<id>, user_id:<userId>, text:'Reply', parent_comment_id:<parentId>} -> Receive 201 with reply comment
GET /rest/v1/comments?event_id=eq.<id>&order=created_at.asc with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with comments and nested replies
POST /rest/v1/comments with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body referencing non-existent parent_comment_id -> Receive 400 Bad Request

features.name: Friends (Unidirectional)
features.description: Add or remove a one-way friend link; adding a friend also generates a notification for the target user.
user_flows: POST /rest/v1/friends with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {user_id:<me>, friend_id:<target>} -> Receive 201 friend record
DELETE /rest/v1/friends?id=eq.<friendRecordId> with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 204 No Content (friend removed)
POST /rest/v1/friends with Authorization: Bearer <token> for an existing friend relation -> Receive 409 Conflict (duplicate friendship)
POST /rest/v1/friends with invalid friend_id format with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 400 Bad Request

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Retrieve recent notifications and mark them read. Notifications surface friend requests, event joins and comments.
user_flows: GET /rest/v1/notifications?user_id=eq.<me>&order=created_at.desc&limit=20 with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with up to 20 notifications
PATCH /rest/v1/notifications?id=eq.<notificationId> with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body {is_read:true} -> Receive 200 with updated notification
PATCH /rest/v1/notifications?id=eq.<notificationId> with Authorization: Bearer <token> when id does not exist -> Receive 404 Not Found
GET /rest/v1/notifications without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: CMS (Public Pages & Modules)
features.description: Fetch published CMS pages and their module lists for rendering public dynamic pages.
user_flows: GET /rest/v1/cms_pages?is_published=eq.true with no auth -> Receive 200 with published page list
GET /rest/v1/cms_modules?page_id=eq.<pageId> with no auth -> Receive 200 with ordered modules for the page
GET /rest/v1/cms_pages?slug=eq.nonexistent with no auth -> Receive 404 Not Found or empty array
GET /rest/v1/cms_modules without page_id when required -> Receive 400 Bad Request

features.name: User Profile API
features.description: CRUD for user profiles stored in public.users table

endpoints.description: Check-in to an event via QR

known_limitations.issue: Backend logic relies on client-side Supabase calls
known_limitations.impact: Security vulnerability if RLS policies are not strictly enforced

known_limitations.issue: Service Role Key exposed in client bundle
known_limitations.impact: Critical security risk allowing administrative access to anyone inspecting the frontend code
